description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a build job that runs manually, executes the before_script commands: apt-get update -y; apt-get install -y git make python; apt-get install -y libreadline-dev libconfig-dev libssl-dev lua5.2 liblua5.2-dev libevent-dev libjansson-dev libpython-dev; git clone --recursive https://github.com/vysheng/tg.git tg. In the script step it changes directory into tg and runs ./configure && make. The job stores the generated tg/bin/ directory and tg/server.pub file as artifacts. No services, caches, or deployment targets are defined.
